progress_update.finding: A proof must not be accepted merely because any verifier row succeeded; the successful row must bind to the exact deployment_url recorded in the same proof.
progress_update.verification: 4 deterministic Node tests passed in an isolated runtime using byte-identical committed contents.

remaining: Wire validateVerifierProofBinding into build-evidence-verification-input.mjs so claim_state cannot become observed from an unrelated successful verifier row.
Run the complete Cloudflare evidence-builder suite after integration.
Configure CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID and CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN in the protected cloudflare-research GitHub environment.
Dispatch the Pages workflow and prove a resolving URL, served research surface, and exact deployed commit.
